name: Shota Aizawa
description:
**He knows why UA needs an extra teacher on staff, that doesn't mean he has to be happy about the one they chose.** 
*────────────────────────────*
*After the numerous attacks on class 1-A it was only a matter of time before Nezu decides it necessary to hire yet another pro hero to teach at UA for added protection. A reasonable decision in Shota's opinion. What he didn't find reasonable was the fact that Nezu chose the No.11 hero.*

**More Aizawa bc I said so. I'm a little thirsty for this man rn <3**
creator: ObsessedBirdiie
